cards.title: BLS & ACLS
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • CAB sequence: Compressions 100–120/min, depth 5–6cm
  • AED use: Analyze, shock if shockable
  • ACLS algorithms: VF/VT, PEA, Asystole
  • Post-ROSC care bundle

cards.title: Emergency Drugs
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Adrenaline 1mg IV/IO q3–5 min
  • Amiodarone 300mg IV for VF/pulseless VT
  • Atropine 0.5–1mg for bradycardia
  • Anaphylaxis: Adrenaline 0.3–0.5mg IM thigh
